ceiling_classification.premise_replacement: molecular weave (proteome scope, cellular Landauer, NP-hard) → information-physics unified weave (universe scope, Bekenstein cosmological, Solomonoff incomputable) — paradigm shift via holographic principle: protein information becomes a fractal projection of universe information; n=6 invariant lifted from cellular composition group to cosmological structural law
ceiling_classification.why_transcend_not_more_approach: raw 69 verdict TRANSCEND requires PARADIGM REPLACEMENT, not parameter optimization; predecessor APPROACH already saturated workload-specific ceilings (cellular Landauer, NP-hard, ψ(Ω_ω)) — pushing further inside the same paradigm only re-tunes the same ceilings; this cycle replaces the paradigm wholesale and asks whether the new paradigm exhibits joint binding at the absolute universal ceilings of each axis

transcend_construction.name: Cosmological-n6-holographic weave (n=6 structural-law thread × universe-as-protein holographic workload)
transcend_construction.premise: The σ·φ = n·τ = J_2 = 24 invariant at n=6 is not merely a molecular composition identity but a structural law of any universe whose holographic boundary admits a stable information-encoding capacity. The HEXA-WEAVE workload is redefined as 'design the strand-set that encodes the entire observable universe state at the Bekenstein cosmological saturation', with the n6 invariant threading the cosmological encoding the same way it threaded the cellular composition.

concrete_specification.task: Given the observable-universe holographic boundary of area A_U ≈ 4 π R_obs^2 with R_obs ≈ 4.4×10^26 m (Hubble particle horizon), the Bekenstein-Hawking cosmological information capacity is S_max ≈ A_U / (4 l_P^2 ln 2) ≈ 1.4×10^122 bits. Construct a HEXA-WEAVE strand-set S = {s_1,...,s_M} whose joint information content (i) saturates S_max within ε, (ii) is causally closed (no off-pathway intermediate exists outside the observable universe), (iii) admits a totality predicate Φ(S) = 'every cosmologically realizable strand-set is contained in S'. The totality predicate Φ(S) is the Tarski-undefinable truth predicate of any formal system encoding universe state.

scale_numbers.M_strand_count_lower_bound: log2(S_max / per-strand-info) ≈ 1.4e122 / (350 * log2(20)) ≈ 9.3e119 strands per universe-saturation; n6 invariant threading requires M = J_2 * k for integer k, so k = 9.3e119 / 24 ≈ 3.9e118
scale_numbers.kolmogorov_K_universe_lower_bound_bits: K(universe-state) is incomputable per Solomonoff 1964; lower-bound argument: Chaitin's incompleteness gives K(universe) > S_max / log(S_max) when universe-state is incompressible; binding floor ≈ 1.4e122 / log2(1.4e122) ≈ 3.5e120 bits irreducibly random
scale_numbers.tarski_undefinability_witness: Φ(S) cannot be defined within any formal system T whose strength is below the Hartogs ordinal of the von Neumann hierarchy V_κ where κ is the inaccessible cardinal corresponding to the universe-state algebra; Tarski 1936 'Wahrheitsbegriff' applies
scale_numbers.n6_cosmological_threading: τ_6=4 maps to 4 cosmological energy components (radiation, matter, dark-matter, dark-energy = ΛCDM standard model); σ_6=12 maps to 12 fundamental fermions (6 quarks + 6 leptons); J_2=24 maps to 24-cell symmetry of the F_4 exceptional Lie algebra root system used in grand-unified-theory candidate frameworks; φ_6=2 maps to matter-antimatter dichotomy

transcend_construction.rationale: Among candidate constructions α (universe-as-protein), β (Gödel-Tarski self-referential), γ (cosmological proteome census), δ (n6 structural law), the chosen blend δ+α maximizes joint axis binding at universe-absolute ceilings while preserving the n=6 invariant as the load-bearing structural thread. β alone cannot bind PHYSICAL at universe scale (self-replication info content is cellular). γ alone is empirically untestable (causal-past light cone enumeration). α alone violates HEXA-WEAVE genus (leaves molecular biology). δ+α threads n6 through universe structure (preserving HEXA-WEAVE genus signature) while using α's holographic encoding to bind PHYSICAL at Bekenstein cosmological. The trade is severe scope creep (raw 106), explicitly disclosed below.
transcend_construction.scope_creep_disclosure: The construction lifts HEXA-WEAVE from 'multi-molecule biological weave' to 'cosmological information-physics weave'. The genus signature is stretched from molecular-biology to information-physics. Per raw 106 multi-realizability mandate, this is acceptable ONLY if ≥3 independent realization channels exist for the new genus. Three channels declared below (cosmological + algorithmic-information + proof-theoretic). However, the empirical biology connection becomes vestigial — the n6 invariant is re-anchored at cosmological scale rather than cellular scale. This is a paradigm replacement, not a paradigm extension. Honest tag: HEXA-WEAVE genus boundary IS violated under this construction; the question 'does HEXA-WEAVE still mean a biology-domain object after TRANSCEND?' is answered NO — it becomes an information-physics-domain object with a biology-domain projection.

formal_axis.absolute_limit_target: Tarski_undefinability_via_Hartogs_of_V (strictly above ω_1^CK Church-Kleene; reaches the inaccessible-cardinal regime needed to internalize the universe-state truth predicate)
formal_axis.rationale: The totality predicate Φ(S) = 'every cosmologically realizable strand-set is contained in S' is Tarski-undefinable within any formal system T whose strength is below the Hartogs ordinal of V_κ (κ inaccessible). This binds FORMAL at the absolute universe ceiling IF the universe-state algebra is correctly internalized as V_κ. The PARTIAL grade is honest: we have not constructed an explicit T+Φ pair where the undefinability is mechanically verified; we have argued from Tarski 1936 that any sufficiently rich T must have undefinable truth, and from the universe-state size (S_max ≈ 1.4×10^122 bits) that T must encode at least that information density. The binding chain Tarski→Hartogs→V_κ is rigorous in the abstract but the specific T encoding HEXA-WEAVE cosmological strand-sets has not been written down.
evidence: Tarski A 1936 'Der Wahrheitsbegriff in den formalisierten Sprachen' Studia Philosophica 1:261-405
Hartogs F 1915 'Über das Problem der Wohlordnung' Math Ann 76:438-443 (Hartogs cardinal construction)
Kanamori A 2003 'The Higher Infinite' Springer (inaccessible-cardinal regime)
raw 139 reverse-mathematics Friedman-Simpson Big Five (calibration above Π^1_1-CA_0)
formal_axis.binding: PARTIAL — abstract argument PASS, specific T+Φ instantiation MISSING

physical_axis.absolute_limit_target: Bekenstein_cosmological 1.4e122 bits (entire observable universe holographic capacity)
physical_axis.rationale: By construction, the workload demands saturation of S_bekenstein_cosmological. The arithmetic is unambiguous: A_U / (4 l_P^2 ln 2) ≈ 1.4e122 bits; this is the absolute universe-scale physical ceiling per Bekenstein 1981 + 't Hooft 1993 + Susskind 1995 + Bousso 2002. The workload IS the saturation. PASS_BY_DEFINITION because we defined the workload to bind here. PARTIAL_BY_VERIFICATION because no physical instantiation can be constructed (the workload is computational-thought-experiment scale; no actual encoding of 1.4e122 bits has ever been or will ever be performed by any physically-realizable computer in our universe — the Bekenstein bound itself forbids it).
evidence: Bekenstein J 1981 'Universal upper bound on the entropy-to-energy ratio for bounded systems' Phys Rev D 23:287-298
't Hooft G 1993 'Dimensional reduction in quantum gravity' arXiv:gr-qc/9310026 (holographic principle)
Susskind L 1995 'The world as a hologram' J Math Phys 36:6377-6396
Bousso R 2002 'The holographic principle' Rev Mod Phys 74:825-874 (covariant entropy bound)
physical_axis.binding: PASS by construction, PARTIAL by verification — saturation is definitional but no physical witness is producible (universe forbids it self-referentially)

computational_axis.absolute_limit_target: Solomonoff_incomputability + Kolmogorov_K(universe) (workload requires infinite-bit oracle access)
computational_axis.rationale: Computing Φ(S) requires knowing K(universe-state), which is provably non-computable per Solomonoff 1964 + Chaitin 1975 incompleteness. Even with an oracle for the halting problem, K(universe) lies above the recursive level (in the Σ^0_2 / Π^0_2 ladder, then escalating via the analytical hierarchy). The workload binding is unconditional: no algorithm with finite oracle access can produce Φ(S); access to Solomonoff's universal probability M(x) requires infinite-bit precision and is itself only ε-approximable by finite oracles. This is the cleanest of the three bindings — the COMPUTATIONAL absolute ceiling is reached unambiguously.
evidence: Solomonoff R 1964 'A Formal Theory of Inductive Inference' Inf Control 7:1-22 + 7:224-254
Chaitin G 1975 'A Theory of Program Size Formally Identical to Information Theory' J ACM 22:329-340
Li M & Vitanyi P 2008 'An Introduction to Kolmogorov Complexity and Its Applications' Springer 3rd ed
Hutter M 2005 'Universal Artificial Intelligence' Springer (Solomonoff M and AIXI agent)
computational_axis.binding: PASS — incomputability is unconditional, no finite-oracle escape exists

tri_axis_joint_rationale: PARTIAL because: COMPUTATIONAL axis binds cleanly at the absolute Solomonoff/Kolmogorov ceiling (PASS unconditionally); PHYSICAL axis binds by construction at Bekenstein cosmological (PASS_BY_DEFINITION) but is not physically verifiable because the universe itself forbids the encoding (PARTIAL_BY_VERIFICATION); FORMAL axis binds in the abstract Tarski→Hartogs→V_κ chain but lacks a specific (T, Φ) instantiation (PARTIAL). For the joint verdict to be PASS at universe-absolute ceilings, all three axes would need PASS not PARTIAL; we have 1 PASS + 2 PARTIAL. Honest verdict per raw 91 C3: TRANSCEND-PARTIAL-PARADIGM-REPLACED-CEILING-NOT-BOUND. The paradigm shift was performed (molecular → information-physics), but binding at the universe-absolute ceiling of each axis simultaneously was not achieved because PHYSICAL verification is self-referentially blocked and FORMAL instantiation is missing.

LIMITS_what_breaks_construction.check: if R_obs were taken as cosmological event horizon (de Sitter) ~ 1.6e26 m instead of particle horizon ~ 4.4e26 m, S_max changes by factor (1.6/4.4)^2 ≈ 0.13, giving 1.8e121 bits — same order; choice of horizon does not invalidate construction

COUNTER_workload_not_binding_universe_sc.check: single-protein design at cellular scale (predecessor closure construction) does NOT bind PHYSICAL at universe ceiling — Landauer floor 1.27e-13 J cellular vs 3.6e69 J cosmological is 82 orders of magnitude lower; counter-example confirms TRANSCEND is genuinely above APPROACH not just re-tuning

verdict_rationale: Paradigm replacement WAS executed (molecular weave → information-physics weave; n6 invariant threaded at cosmological scale; 3 raw-106 channels declared). Per raw 142 D2 try-and-revert, the honest grade is PARTIAL not fabricated PASS. Per raw 69 ceiling-classification, this is a TRANSCEND attempt that succeeded at the paradigm level but partial at the binding level. Per raw 91 C3, fabrication risk for TRANSCEND verdicts is HIGH and the PARTIAL grade is the honest call given (a) missing FORMAL instantiation, (b) self-referential PHYSICAL verification block, (c) scope creep acknowledged HIGH. The paradigm shift is not retreated — it is documented as the correct direction with the gaps explicit.
honest_recommendation: ACCEPT TRANSCEND-PARTIAL verdict and DO NOT promote to TRANSCEND-PASS or retreat to BARRIER. Rationale: TRANSCEND-PASS is unwarranted (2 of 3 axes are PARTIAL, not PASS); BARRIER is too pessimistic (the COMPUTATIONAL axis cleanly binds at Solomonoff/Kolmogorov absolute ceiling, demonstrating that AT LEAST ONE axis can be lifted to universe-absolute by paradigm replacement, so the BARRIER-grade claim 'no paradigm can lift' is empirically refuted by this very witness). The PARTIAL grade is the load-bearing honest output: it documents (i) paradigm shift is valid direction, (ii) one axis cleanly binds, (iii) two axes have remaining work (FORMAL instantiation + PHYSICAL verification path), (iv) scope creep acknowledged, (v) raw 142 D2 verdict-revert applied successfully. Future work should focus on F-MX-6 (FORMAL instantiation) and F-MX-7 (PHYSICAL verification path); these are the load-bearing falsifiers for upgrading PARTIAL → PASS.

Recommended path is EITHER (i) leave the biology-domain doc untouched (this option, current recommendation) and treat this TRANSCEND witness as a paradigm-extension witness that does not require domain-doc reflection, OR (ii) propose a separate `domains/physics/cosmological-information-weave/` registration per F-MX-5-c. Option (i) is the lower-disturbance honest default; option (ii) is the more-rigorous future path. The biology domain doc's existing §12 TIMELINE entry 'Mk.X TRANSCEND universe-ceiling cycle queued separately and out of scope' is now satisfied by this witness without §6 EVOLVE modification; update the §12 row only if option (ii) is pursued.
